ddls:
CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the employee */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the employee */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the employee */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department the employee belongs to */,
  "job_role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the job role of the employee */,
  "monthly_income" REAL /* Monthly income of the employee */,
  "monthly_rate" REAL /* Monthly rate of the employee */,
  "total_working_years" INTEGER /* Total years of work experience of the employee */,
  "years_at_company" INTEGER /* Years the employee has been at the company */,
  "years_in_current_role" INTEGER /* Years the employee has been in their current role */,
  "years_since_last_promotion" INTEGER /* Years since the employee's last promotion */,
  "years_with_curr_manager" INTEGER /* Years the employee has worked with their current manager */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the employee */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the employee */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the employee resides */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the employee resides */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the employee resides */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the employee's address */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_job_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_role_id") REFERENCES job_roles ("job_role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "department_description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_roles" (
  "job_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job role */,
  "job_role_name" TEXT /* Name of the job role */,
  "job_role_description" TEXT /* Description of the job role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_evaluations" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee being evaluated */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date of the evaluation */,
  "evaluation_score" REAL /* Score of the evaluation */,
  "evaluation_comments" TEXT /* Comments from the evaluation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_evaluations_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the program */,
  "program_description" TEXT /* Description of the program */,
  "program_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the program in days */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_training" (
  "training_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee being trained */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the training program */,
  "training_date" TEXT /* Date of the training */,
  "training_status" TEXT /* Status of the training (e.g., completed, pending, cancelled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("training_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_training_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES training_programs ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_training_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compensation" (
  "compensation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compensation record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee being compensated */,
  "monthly_income" REAL /* Monthly income of the employee */,
  "monthly_rate" REAL /* Monthly rate of the employee */,
  "bonus" REAL /* Bonus amount for the employee */,
  "stock_options" REAL /* Stock options granted to the employee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compensation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compensation_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "benefits" (
  "benefit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each benefit */,
  "benefit_name" TEXT /* Name of the benefit */,
  "benefit_description" TEXT /* Description of the benefit */,
  "benefit_cost" REAL /* Cost of the benefit to the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("benefit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_benefits" (
  "benefit_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the benefit */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee receiving the benefit */,
  "benefit_date" TEXT /* Date the benefit was awarded */,
  "benefit_status" TEXT /* Status of the benefit (e.g., active, inactive, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("benefit_id", "employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "business_travel" (
  "travel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each travel policy */,
  "travel_name" TEXT /* Name of the travel policy */,
  "travel_description" TEXT /* Description of the travel policy */,
  "travel_reimbursement_rate" REAL /* Reimbursement rate for travel expenses */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("travel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_travel" (
  "travel_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the travel policy */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee */,
  "travel_date" TEXT /* Date of the travel */,
  "travel_destination" TEXT /* Destination of the travel */,
  "travel_purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of the travel */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("travel_id", "employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "education" (
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education level */,
  "education_name" TEXT /* Name of the education level */,
  "education_description" TEXT /* Description of the education level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_education" (
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the education level */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee */,
  "education_date" TEXT /* Date the education was completed */,
  "education_institution" TEXT /* Institution where the education was completed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_id", "employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environment_satisfaction" (
  "satisfaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each satisfaction level */,
  "satisfaction_name" TEXT /* Name of the satisfaction level */,
  "satisfaction_description" TEXT /* Description of the satisfaction level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("satisfaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_satisfaction" (
  "satisfaction_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the satisfaction level */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee */,
  "satisfaction_date" TEXT /* Date the satisfaction was recorded */,
  "satisfaction_comments" TEXT /* Comments from the employee about their satisfaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("satisfaction_id", "employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee providing feedback */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was provided */,
  "feedback_comments" TEXT /* Comments from the employee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_feedback_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_goal_setting" (
  "goal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each goal */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee */,
  "goal_date" TEXT /* Date the goal was set */,
  "goal_description" TEXT /* Description of the goal */,
  "goal_status" TEXT /* Status of the goal (e.g., completed, pending, cancelled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("goal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_goal_setting_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)
